overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style nightclub. The player walks through neon-lit corridors and restrooms, passing various NPCs, with prominent red and purple lighting creating a futuristic atmosphere.

person in gold jacket walking past the camera

red neon sign spelling TOILET mounted on the wall
restroom entrance doors featuring aggressive wolf poster and graffiti text FREE YOUR FREAK

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow nightclub corridor with distinctive hexagonal floor tiles and red neon lighting. The camera moves forward past patrons walking in the opposite direction, approaching a restroom entrance marked by a red TOILET sign and striking poster art.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub restroom with sink counter and mirrors

events.description: turning around to exit the restroom after observing the interior

agents.ego_description: entering the restroom, observing the sink area and mirrors, then turning to leave

notable_agents.action: person standing at the sink counter looking in the mirror
person sitting against the wall near the exit

entered.detail: long white counter with multiple sinks and mirrors mounted above
bright purple neon light running along the ceiling edge
neon sign with bicycle icon and TOYS text visible through the exit doorway

segments.scene_description: Inside the restroom, the lighting shifts to purple neon illuminating a long sink counter with mirrors. A few patrons stand at the sinks or sit against walls. The camera explores the space briefly before turning to exit, revealing a TOYS neon sign through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor with large digital advertisements

events.description: entering the corridor with large digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: exiting the first restroom and walking through the advertisement-lined corridor toward the second restroom

notable_agents.action: couple embracing near the wall by the TOYS sign

entered.detail: large digital screen showing woman with red sports car and text NEXT LEVEL CORPORATE WEAR LUXURY
vertical poster with face and text 3MOUTHS 1DESIRE SashaDevon

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the restroom into a corridor featuring large digital advertisements, including a luxury car ad and a provocative poster. The lighting mixes red and blue tones. A couple embraces near the wall as the camera passes toward another restroom entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: second nightclub restroom with sinks and toilet stalls

events.description: moving from the sink area into the toilet stall section of the restroom

agents.ego_description: entering the second restroom, passing the sinks, and approaching the toilet stalls

notable_agents.action: person in striped vest standing at the sink counter
group of people entering the restroom from the corridor

entered.detail: metal counter with sinks and blue neon light strip above the mirrors
open stall door leading to the toilet area

segments.scene_description: Entering a second restroom with blue neon lighting and metal sinks, the camera moves past patrons washing up and a group entering from the corridor. The space leads toward an open toilet stall in the back, with sticker-covered walls visible along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: toilet stall and return corridor to main club

events.description: camera focuses on a filthy toilet with blood stains and debris
entering the main nightclub area with bar and stage visible

agents.ego_description: inspecting the dirty toilet, then exiting the restroom and entering the main club area with the bar

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking toward the bar area

entered.detail: filthy white toilet with blood stains, debris, and cockroaches on the floor
circular bar with white stools and large cylindrical aquarium stage with dancers in the background
large digital screen showing woman with red sports car visible when exiting

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on a disgustingly dirty toilet with blood stains before turning to exit. Passing the advertisements again, the scene transitions into the main club area featuring a circular bar, white stools, and a central stage with dancers visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched nightclub, transitioning from narrow, red-lit corridors into sterile restrooms before finally opening into the expansive main club area. It begins by moving through a corridor with hexagonal floor tiles and red neon lighting, passing patrons toward a restroom entrance marked by a red sign. As the camera enters the restroom, the lighting shifts to purple neon reflecting off a long sink counter, before the view turns back toward the exit to reveal a TOYS neon sign. The scene then expands into a corridor of mixed red and blue tones filled with large digital advertisements and embracing couples, leading the camera into a second restroom characterized by blue neon and sticker-covered walls. After focusing on a stained toilet in the back, the camera exits past the advertisements once more, finally emerging into the main club space featuring a circular bar with white stools and dancers on a central stage.
